name: PhenoVCS
absorption_note: Version control primitives registry with Git worktree management. Target: pheno monorepo as crates/pheno-vcs. Complements SessionLedger (already absorbed) — SessionLedger handles session/continuation bundles; PhenoVCS handles VCS primitives (worktree mgmt, git operations, repo abstractions).
note: Audited 2026-07-17; Rust VCS primitives crate; clean absorption target.
